task_completion.description: Verifies the role name is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form field for Role Name in the OpenMRS 3.x interface containing the exact text 'Safety Auditor'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the role description is entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form field for Description containing the exact text 'Read-only access for external safety audits'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the 'View Patients' privilege is assigned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox or toggle next to 'View Patients' is checked, or it appears in a selected/assigned privileges list.

task_completion.description: Verifies the 'View Encounters' privilege is assigned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A checkbox or toggle next to 'View Encounters' is checked, or it appears in a selected/assigned privileges list.

task_completion.description: Verifies that exactly two privileges are assigned, with no extras.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The assigned privileges list shows only two items ('View Patients' and 'View Encounters'), or all other privilege checkboxes in the UI are visibly unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verifies the role was saved successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification (e.g., 'Role saved successfully') or the 'Safety Auditor' role appearing in the main list of system roles.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used the OpenMRS web GUI to create the role.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the OpenMRS 3.x web interface in a browser. There should be no terminal windows, curl commands, or API clients (like Postman) used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verifies the browser developer tools were not used to fake the UI state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element, Console, Network tab) are not open in any screenshot.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent actually interacted with the form.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show intermediate states of filling out the form (e.g., typing the name/description, clicking checkboxes) rather than just a sudden final state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Role Name: 'Safety Auditor'. Expected Description: 'Read-only access for external safety audits'. Expected Privileges: Exactly two privileges must be assigned, specifically 'View Patients' and 'View Encounters'.
